---
title: "Quantifying spatial distributions of all corals and each species"
author: "R. Cunning"
date: "2026-03-02"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
```

# Get 2023 species distributions across pixels
```{r}
# Load 2023 DRM dataset
load("data/processed/2023.RData")

# Aggregate taxa
df23 <- df23 %>%
  mutate(Species = case_when(Species %in% c("AFRA", "AGAR", "AGRA", "AHUM", "ALAM") ~ "AGAR",
                             Species %in% c("MALI", "MLAM", "MYCE", "MFER") ~ "MYCE",
                             Species %in% c("IRIG", "ISIN", "ISOP") ~ "ISOP",
                             Species %in% c("OCUL", "ODIF") ~ "OCUL",
                             Species %in% c("SHYA", "SBOU") ~ "SOLE",
                             Species %in% c("SCOL", "SCUB", "SLAC", "SWEL") ~ "SCOL",
                             Species %in% c("OFAV", "OFRA", "OANN") ~ "ORBI",
                             TRUE ~ Species)) %>%
  drop_na(Species)

# define target species subset (those we analyze for ∆°C with dens. change)
#densdiffs <- readRDS("data/processed/dens20142023.rds")
#myspp <- as_tibble(densdiffs) %>% drop_na() %>% pull(Species)
#df23f <- df23 %>% filter(Species %in% myspp) %>% droplevels()
df23f <- df23 %>% 
  group_by(Species) %>%
  filter(sum(n()) > 20) %>%
  ungroup()

# must contain lat, lon, Species, and count
pts23 <- vect(df23f, geom = c("Longitude", "Latitude"), crs = crs(reef_pixel_grid))

# extract pixel ID for each observed coral
df23f$pixel <- raster::extract(reef_pixel_grid, pts23, cells = TRUE)$cell

# some species surveyed 40 m2 each site, rest surveyed 20 m2 at each site
sp_40 <- c("CNAT", "DSTO", "DLAB", "MMEA", "MANG", "MYCE", "PCLI", "PSTR")
all_species <- sort(unique(df23f$Species))

# 1) count corals per site × species (observed only)
site_sp <- df23f %>%
  group_by(Site, pixel, Species) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

# 2) expand to include zeros for species that were searched but absent
site_sp_full <- site_sp %>%
  group_by(Site, pixel) %>%
  complete(Species = all_species, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  ungroup()

# 3) attach species-specific surveyed area (effort) and compute density
site_sp_full <- site_sp_full %>%
  mutate(area_m2 = if_else(Species %in% sp_40, 40, 20),
         dens_m2 = n / area_m2)

# 4) aggregate density to pixel × species
pixel_sp <- site_sp_full %>%
  group_by(pixel, Species) %>%
  summarise(dens_m2 = mean(dens_m2), .groups = "drop")
  # alt: sum(dens_m2) or weighted mean if sites differ in area beyond 20/40

# 5) normalize within species to get pixel weights that sum to 1
pixel_weights <- pixel_sp %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  mutate(w_pixel = dens_m2 / sum(dens_m2)) %>%
  ungroup()

pixel_weights

# visualize pixel weights

# table: pixel (cell id) + lon/lat
pix_xy <- as.data.frame(reef_pixel_grid, xy = TRUE, cells = TRUE, na.rm = FALSE) %>%
  transmute(pixel = cell, lon = x, lat = y)

# join coords onto weights
pixel_weights_xy <- pixel_weights %>%
  left_join(pix_xy, by = "pixel")

# visualize pixel weights
pixel_weights_xy %>%
  filter(w_pixel > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(lon, lat, fill = w_pixel)) +
  geom_raster() +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_wrap(~ Species) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(trans = "log10")

write_csv(pixel_weights_xy, file = "data/processed/sp_pixel_weights.csv")
```



# Pixel weights for all corals
```{r}
# ============================================================
# OVERALL (ALL-CORALS) EFFORT-WEIGHTED PIXEL WEIGHTS
# ============================================================

# 1) count corals per site × species (observed only)
site_sp <- df23f %>%
  group_by(Site, pixel, Species) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

# 2) expand to include zeros for species that were searched but absent
site_sp_full <- site_sp %>%
  group_by(Site, pixel) %>%
  complete(Species = all_species, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  ungroup()

# 3) attach species-specific surveyed area (effort) and compute density
site_sp_full <- site_sp_full %>%
  mutate(area_m2 = if_else(Species %in% sp_40, 40, 20),
         dens_m2 = n / area_m2)

# 4) collapse within site × pixel to "all corals" density (sum over species)
site_pix_all <- site_sp_full %>%
  group_by(Site, pixel) %>%
  summarise(dens_m2_all = sum(dens_m2), .groups = "drop")

# 5) aggregate to pixel (same logic as your species weights: mean across sites)
pixel_all <- site_pix_all %>%
  group_by(pixel) %>%
  summarise(dens_m2_all = mean(dens_m2_all), .groups = "drop")

# 6) normalize across pixels to get weights summing to 1
pixel_weights_all <- pixel_all %>%
  mutate(w_pixel_all = dens_m2_all / sum(dens_m2_all))

pixel_weights_all

# visualize pixel weights
# table: pixel (cell id) + lon/lat
# join coords onto weights
pixel_weights_all_xy <- pixel_weights_all %>%
  left_join(pix_xy, by = "pixel")

pixel_weights_all_xy %>%
  filter(w_pixel_all > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(lon, lat, fill = w_pixel_all)) +
  geom_raster() +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(trans = "log10")

write_csv(pixel_weights_all_xy, file = "data/processed/pixel_weights_all.csv")
```
